name: Art Workshop
bio: Learn how to create cartoon characters using your imagination by experimenting with shapes, expressions, and personality. Start by imagining what kind of character you want to bring to life—funny, adventurous, shy, or bold—and use simple shapes like circles, squares, or triangles to build the head and body. Add unique features such as expressive eyes, distinctive hairstyles, or quirky accessories to make your character stand out. Consider how your character moves and behaves, as posture and facial expressions help convey emotions and tell a story. By practicing and experimenting, you will develop your own style and learn to create original, lively cartoon characters full of personality.

name: Dress to Impress
bio: Show your cosplay on the stage and shine bright like a diamond!

name: League of Legends: TOURNAMENT
bio: Get your skills together and play with your team against other teams to win this tournament and rule the grounds of Demacia!

name: Anime Drawing Masterclass
bio: Join professional illustrators as they guide you through the process of creating stunning anime-style characters. Learn techniques for proportions, facial expressions, dynamic poses, and shading. Whether you're a beginner or experienced artist, this session will help you refine your skills and bring your characters to life with more depth and personality.

name: Marvel vs DC Debate
bio: Fans gather to discuss and debate the greatest superheroes, storylines, and cinematic moments from Marvel and DC universes.

name: Super Smash Bros Tournament
bio: Compete against other players in an intense Super Smash Bros tournament.

name: Cosplay Repair Station Workshop
bio: Learn essential tips and tricks to repair and maintain your cosplay on the go.

name: Voice Actors Live Q&A
bio: Meet famous voice actors and hear behind-the-scenes stories.

name: Indie Game Challenge
bio: Try out a variety of indie games developed by upcoming creators.

name: Storytelling for Comics
bio: Explore the art of storytelling in comics and visual narratives.

name: Retro Arcade Free Play
bio: Enjoy classic arcade games and relive the golden age of gaming.

name: Build Your Own Comic
bio: Create your own short comic from scratch with guidance from experienced artists.

name: Closing Cosplay Parade
bio: Celebrate the best cosplayers of the event in a grand finale parade.
